name: United Settlement
description_short: United Settlement is a Dallas-based credit repair firm. 1,959 Google reviews. Not BBB rated or accredited.
description_long:
United Settlement is a credit repair and financial services firm based in Dallas, Texas, with approximately 1,959 Google reviews. The company offers credit repair dispute services to help consumers address inaccurate items on their credit reports.

The company is not BBB accredited and has no BBB rating. Services include credit report analysis, dispute filing, and credit-building guidance. As with all credit repair providers, consumers should verify pricing, contract terms, and cancellation policies before enrolling.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high Google rating (4.8/5) across nearly 2,000 reviews, indicating consistent client satisfaction
New York-based and subject to state-level regulatory oversight, which provides added consumer protections compared to some out-of-state operators
Appears to offer services beyond basic settlement, including credit counseling and financial consulting
Strong review volume suggests an established track record rather than a newer or unproven operation
Consultation-based approach may allow for more tailored solutions compared to one-size-fits-all programs
Working with unsecured debt types common to most consumers, including credit cards and medical bills
cons: Debt settlement — the core service — will typically damage credit scores during the program, which can last several years
Fee structures in this industry can be substantial; specific pricing is not publicly disclosed and must be confirmed directly
Not all creditors will negotiate, meaning program outcomes are not guaranteed regardless of the firm's quality
Falling behind on payments as part of a settlement strategy can expose clients to creditor lawsuits or wage garnishment
Limited publicly available information about accreditation status or regulatory filings, which consumers should verify before enrolling
best_for: Dallas-area consumers seeking credit repair services
Individuals with credit report errors needing dispute assistance
diagnosis: United Settlement has moderate Google review volume (1,959) but lacks BBB accreditation. Without independent verification, consumers should get pricing in writing and compare against BBB-accredited alternatives like MSI Credit Solutions or national providers.
services: Debt settlement negotiation with unsecured creditors
Escrow account management for settlement funds
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: United Settlement is a Dallas-based credit repair firm. 1,959 Google reviews. Not BBB rated or accredited.
